steps.description: Clone the standalone FireRedVAD repo into the model-local directory so phase-1 can validate the repo-native path and capture the tested commit.
Create an isolated model-local Python 3.10 environment without mutating the host conda environment.
Install the repository-native macOS arm64 dependency plan first because it is the closest executable upstream evidence on this host.
Expose the repo-native fireredvad import path from the cloned source and install Hugging Face download tooling into the model-local env.
Download the official weight bundle into the model-local checkpoints directory and expose the repo-native pretrained_models path as a symlink alias.
Run import/load/infer/contract on the selected shared VAD fixture and persist raw output before wrapper normalization.

notes: The selected fixture is a shared VAD fallback because tests/fixtures/shared/vad/en_16k.wav is absent in-repo.
Weights satisfy model_local_first by downloading into checkpoints/FireRedVAD and aliasing the repo-native pretrained_models path to that location.
The only authorized retry at FETCH_WEIGHTS is to switch from an incorrect CLI executable name to the verified local hf CLI entrypoint.
The only authorized retry during bundle export is to disable pip build isolation for the prebuilt replay env seed so replay remains bundle-only.
